name: OffSec Certified Professional (OSCP)
description: 24-hour hands-on penetration testing exam covering exploitation, active directory, and privilege escalation.

name: Certified Information Systems Security Professional
description: Advanced technical and managerial skills for designing, engineering, and managing information security programs.

name: AWS Certified Security - Specialty
description: Validation of AWS knowledge across security topics such as data protection, IAM, and incident response.
